search.error: City not found. Check the name.
search.location_error: Could not get your location. Search manually.
search.geolocation_error: Your browser does not support geolocation

favorites.title: ⭐ Favorite cities
favorites.empty: You have no favorite cities yet. Click ⭐ to add.

footer.copyright: Weather data © OpenWeather | © 2026 WeatherApp - Your real-time weather

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing and using this weather application, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our application.
terms.use_text: Our application provides real-time weather information. You agree to:
terms.use_item1: Use the application only for legal purposes
terms.use_item2: Do not overload our servers with excessive requests
terms.use_item3: Do not attempt to access restricted areas of the application
terms.accuracy_text: Weather information is provided by OpenWeatherMap. While we strive to provide accurate data, we do not guarantee accuracy, completeness or timeliness. Weather can change quickly and data may have delays.
terms.liability_text: We are not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our application, including decisions based on the weather information provided.
terms.modifications_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately after posting on this page.
terms.contact_text: If you have questions about these terms, contact us through our contact form.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.info_item1: Geographic location: With your permission, we access your location to show you local weather.
privacy.info_item2: Favorite cities: We save your favorite cities in your browser (localStorage).
privacy.info_item3: Usage data: Anonymous information about how you interact with the application.
privacy.use_item1: Show you the weather at your current location
privacy.use_item3: Improve our application based on usage patterns
privacy.storage_text: Your data is stored locally in your browser (localStorage). We do not store your data on external servers. Your favorite cities remain only on your device.
privacy.third_party_text: We use the following third party services:
privacy.rights_item3: Disable geolocation at any time from your browser
privacy.rights_item4: Clear your favorite cities by deleting site data in your browser
privacy.contact_text: For questions about this policy, contact us at: privacy@weatherapp.com

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.what_text: Cookies are small text files that websites store in your browser to remember information about your preferences and activities.
cookies.we_use_text: Our application uses the following types of cookies:
cookies.technical_item1: localStorage: Stores your favorite cities locally in your browser.
cookies.technical_item2: Location preferences: We remember if you agreed to share your location.
cookies.third_party_item1: Vercel Analytics: Anonymous cookies to measure application performance.
cookies.manage_text: You can manage cookies from your browser:
cookies.manage_item1: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
cookies.manage_item2: Firefox: Options → Privacy and security → Cookies and site data
cookies.manage_item3: Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Cookies and website data
cookies.manage_item4: Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions
cookies.manage_note: Note: If you disable cookies, favorite cities will not be saved between sessions.
cookies.consent_text: By using our application, you consent to the use of cookies according to this policy. You can withdraw your consent at any time by adjusting your browser settings.
cookies.changes_text: We will update this policy when necessary. Changes will be posted on this page with a new 'last updated' date.

data_sources.title: Data Sources
data_sources.weather_text: All weather data is provided by OpenWeatherMap, a leading global weather information service. OpenWeatherMap collects data from:
data_sources.accuracy_text: Data is updated regularly according to OpenWeatherMap cycles. The information displayed includes:
data_sources.attribution_text: This application uses OpenWeatherMap data under its license terms. Attribution is required and is visible in the footer of our application. © 2026 OpenWeatherMap. All rights reserved.
data_sources.limitations_text: Weather data may have delays or variations. For critical decisions (travel, outdoor events, etc.), we recommend consulting additional official sources.
